title: Nearly 700,000 Displaced by War in Lebanon, U.N. Says
summary_full: Mass evacuation orders and an intensifying Israeli bombing campaign targeting the Iran-backed militia Hezbollah have caused a humanitarian crisis, aid groups warn.
